transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hello. I used your ATM on Maple Lane this morning and I'm pretty sure it gave me the wrong amount. I asked for eighty and I think I only got sixty.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right, I can log something for that. Your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay Mr. Marsh, let me see what we've got... I'm going to need to bring in a colleague on this actually.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: A colleague? Should I have a pen handy for a reference number?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes — actually, hold on, let me just check something first.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: So Mr. Marsh I've had a quick look and I think what we'll do is have our specialist team call you back within two working days.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Call me back? Will I need to explain everything again?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They'll have some notes from me. Is the number we have on file okay?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I suppose so, but can I just get a reference number for now?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: A reference will be generated when they call. Thanks for your patience Mr. Marsh.

planted_violations: did not raise ATM discrepancy report directly; deferred entirely to callback
failed to provide any case reference number
customer left without confirmation of next steps or timeline
